name: Research Funding Allocation Pie Chart
input: Create a pie chart showing the allocation of a $2.5M NIH R01 grant. Personnel (PI, Co-I, Postdoc, 2 Grad Students, Lab Tech): 55%. Equipment (Flow cytometer, Sequencer access fees): 15%. Supplies (Reagents, Cell cultures, Animal models): 18%. Travel (2 conferences/year): 4%. Indirect costs (F&A): 8%.
qualityCriteria: All 5 budget categories present (Personnel, Equipment, Supplies, Travel, Indirect)
Percentage values are correct and sum to 100%
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Clean pie chart with 5 colored slices, percentage labels on each slice, legend with category names, professional color palette.
